# NIC Driver Porting Orchestrator — Dependencies
# This file contains ALL dependencies needed for the multi-agent porting pipeline
#
# Installation:
#   pip install -r agent-requirements.txt

# Core dependencies
python-dotenv          # Environment variable management
PyYAML                 # YAML parsing (connection-info files)

# LangChain/LangGraph dependencies (used by pipeline agents)
langchain              # Core LangChain framework
langchain-openai       # Azure OpenAI integration
langchain-core         # LangChain core components (messages, prompts)
langgraph              # Graph-based agent orchestration
openai                 # OpenAI API client

# Azure authentication
azure-identity
